reviews.review_msg: Im not joking hes awful. he doesnt teach at this university anymore he teaches at the university of manchester. Im sure he's a great researcher and a lovely guy but he should not be in a lecture hall has ZERO time for you out of hours literally doesnt even respond to emails. literally the bare minimum of information. calls derivative doodoodoo. ugh
Easy prof, though his notes are lacking organization and commentary, and can be hard to follow.  He is quite helpful in his office hours.

Nice course, exams are really base on examples and HWs; if u look the HW and practice, u can pass the course easily. there are also some changlle questions on each exams to pump up the marks for good students
